name: Evening Flows
description: Slower sequences to wind down after the day.

entries.name: Candlelight Stretch
entries.summary: A short, soothing stretch to release the shoulders and hips before bed.

steps.title: Neck Release
steps.instruction: Sit tall and gently drop one ear toward the shoulder; switch sides.

steps.title: Seated Side Bend
steps.instruction: Reach one arm overhead and lean to the side, breathing into the ribs.

steps.title: Reclined Butterfly
steps.instruction: Lie back, soles together, knees wide; rest and breathe.

entries.name: Legs-Up-the-Wall
entries.summary: A single restorative pose to calm the nervous system.

steps.title: Set Up
steps.instruction: Sit beside a wall, swing the legs up, and lie back with arms relaxed.

steps.title: Rest
steps.instruction: Stay and breathe slowly; let the legs be heavy.
